title: Penitency.
content:
A man's transgressions God does then remit,
    When man He makes a penitent for it.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Penitency.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
